text: Scrap any unit with an unsalvageable subsystem fault.
details: Programming: scrap units with corrupted, untypeable command strings.
Gears: scrap units with cracked drivetrain gears.
Wires: scrap units with severed or unreachable required circuits.
Circuit Board: scrap boards with isolated single cells that cannot be populated.

text: Scrap any unit that fails subsystem compliance verification.
details: Programming: scrap units that return invalid or protocol-compromised outputs.
Gears: scrap units containing rejected or contraband-marked gears.
Wires: scrap units that route the wrong power type to a required module.
Circuit Board: scrap boards with corrupted or invalid region markers.

text: Scrap any unit showing hazardous instability, contamination, or unsafe discharge.
details: Programming: scrap units showing a green debugger bug with red sparks.
Gears: scrap units with sparking or overtorqued drivetrain components.
Wires: scrap units with red-flashing underpowered or overloaded modules.
Circuit Board: scrap boards with red-charged unstable regions.
